headlines.description: — Caleb Williams rolled toward the right sideline and unleashed a pass he probably had no business attempting. DJ Moore went up in a crowd in the back of the end zone and came...
headlines.shortLinkText: Caleb Williams throws for 2 TDs, Bears pound Browns even as Myles Garrett closes in on sacks record

headlines.description: — The Baltimore Ravens served notice that they have plenty of fight left as they pursue a third straight AFC North title.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lamar Jackson's 2 TD passes, long pick-6 propel Ravens to 24-0 win over Bengals

events.name: Los Angeles Chargers at Kansas City Chiefs

headlines.description: — The final images of the Kansas City Chiefs' postseason pursuit were Patrick Mahomes getting helped to the locker room with what turned out to be a
headlines.shortLinkText: Mahomes tears ACL as Chargers eliminate Chiefs from playoff contention with 16-13 victory

events.name: Buffalo Bills at New England Patriots

headlines.description: — The New England Patriots are still in good position to win the AFC East. But the Buffalo Bills made sure it would have to happen on another day, against a different opponent.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bills rally from 21-point deficit to beat Patriots 35-31, stay alive in AFC East race

events.name: Washington Commanders at New York Giants

headlines.description: — Marcus Mariota emerged from the Washington Commanders' first victory celebration since Oct. 5 with a sense of relief. Beating the New York Giants...
headlines.shortLinkText: Commanders beat the Giants 29-21 to end their losing streak at 8 games

events.name: Las Vegas Raiders at Philadelphia Eagles

headlines.description: — Jalen Hurts smacked A.J. Brown helmet-to-helmet after a touchdown pass for a celebration that seemed to release the pent-up tension that came tethered to a losing streak.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jalen Hurts rebounds with 3 TD passes as Eagles snap losing streak in 31-0 rout of Raiders

events.name: New York Jets at Jacksonville Jaguars

headlines.description: — This was Trevor Lawrence at his finest, a franchise quarterback making plays with his arm and his legs.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jaguars overwhelm Jets from start to finish in 48-20 rout, reach 10 wins

headlines.description: — The Houston Texans have shaken off their awful start to the season with a six-game winning streak that has them in the thick of the AFC playoff race with three regular-season games left.
headlines.shortLinkText: C.J. Stroud leads Texans to 6th straight win, 40-20 over Cardinals

events.name: Green Bay Packers at Denver Broncos

headlines.description: — The Denver Broncos were slogging their way through a rare clunker Sunday against the Green Bay Packers when cornerback Pat Surtain II delivered the game-saving takeaway.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bo Nix's 4 TD passes lead Broncos to 34-26 win over Packers, who lose Micah Parsons to injury

events.name: Detroit Lions at Los Angeles Rams

headlines.description: — The Los Angeles Rams faced their biggest deficit in more than two months when they fell 10 points behind Detroit with 30 seconds left in the first half. Even worse, both their offense and their defense felt they were letting each other down.
headlines.shortLinkText: Matthew Stafford rallies Rams to 41-34 victory over Lions, clinching another playoff berth

events.name: Carolina Panthers at New Orleans Saints

headlines.description: — A rookie quarterback who made his first start in midseason and a kicker from Northern Ireland who made his NFL debut three games ago stunted the Carolina Panther's playoff push.
headlines.shortLinkText: Shough's clutch drive and Smyth's kick lift the Saints past the Panthers, 20-17

headlines.description: — The San Francisco 49ers know their high-powered offense will need to carry the load if they are going to make a deep playoff run.
headlines.shortLinkText: Purdy's 3 TD passes lead 49ers to 37-24 win over Titans

headlines.description: — Jason Myers has quietly been a big part of the Seattle Seahawks' success this season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Seahawks outlast Philip Rivers and Colts 18-16 on Jason Myers' 56-yard field goal

headlines.description: — The last time Dak Prescott and the Dallas Cowboys were on their home field, they had finished a two-game sweep of last season's Super Bowl teams to spark talk of a rally to a playoff spot.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dak Prescott and Cowboys watch playoff hopes all but vanish in 34-26 loss to Vikings
